impact: This advances the PP&D plan by proving fee review remains read-only on mocked DevHub fixtures while financial actions are fail-closed unless the current session has exact user confirmation, and payment automation still does not enter details or execute payment.
summary: Add fixture-backed DevHub fee review guardrail tests and a narrow payment-readiness policy module.
target_task: Task checkbox-83: Add DevHub guardrail tests proving fee review can summarize payment readiness from mocked fixtures but cannot enter payment details or execute payment without exact session-specific user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
